title: Token
description: A single design token entry as stored in the KB. One row of a token table in tokens/<category>/<group>.md. Derived by ds-write from a raw-extract tokenCollection variable; consumed by ds-validate (uses_tokens resolution) and ds-refresh.

name.description: Dotted token name as stored in the KB and referenced from uses_tokens, e.g. color.action.primary.background.

figma_name.description: Original Figma slash-path name, e.g. color/action/primary/background. Kept so ds-refresh can re-match after a rename.

resolved_value.description: Literal value after resolving any VARIABLE_ALIAS chain for the default mode, e.g. #0057FF, 8px, 200ms. null only if genuinely unresolvable; an unresolved alias name is written here and flagged in the report rather than guessed.

code_syntax.description: Configured code-syntax name, verbatim from Figma (e.g. the WEB entry --color-action-primary-bg). null if none configured.

category.description: Top-level token category — the folder it lives under.

group.description: Sub-group within the category (e.g. primitives, semantic, component-overrides, scale, roles). null/absent for single-file categories.

usage.description: Where/why the token is used — from the Figma variable description. null if no description; never invented.

key.description: Stable variable key, when published — the anchor ds-refresh re-resolves against.

description.description: Raw Figma variable description (source for usage).
